Description: Review user access for operational systems and SCADA environments on a quarterly basis.
Apply security patches to industrial control systems during approved maintenance windows.
Continuously monitor emissions and permit compliance requirements.
Require multi-factor authentication for remote and privileged SCADA access.
Perform scheduled maintenance on critical utility and electrical assets.
Maintain and periodically exercise utility outage and emergency response procedures.
Monitor equipment health and perform predictive maintenance on critical assets.
Perform scheduled inspections and calibration of Continuous Emissions Monitoring Systems.
Review water discharge reports for completeness and regulatory compliance.
Review, approve, and document changes to industrial control system configurations.
Require MFA for all privileged and remote access accounts.
Control, approve, and continuously monitor privileged user accounts.
Perform continuous vulnerability scanning and timely remediation.
Review cloud configurations against approved security baselines.
Encrypt sensitive business data at rest and during transmission.
Detect malicious activity on workstations and servers.
Provide recurring security awareness and phishing training.
Review user provisioning, role changes, and account termination processes.
Collect and analyze security logs for suspicious activity.
Assess and continuously monitor third-party vendors for security risk.
